query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS iscritti_con_apertura,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active') AS totale_attivi,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active'), 1) AS percentuale_open_rate
FROM subscribers s
INNER JOIN newsletter_sends ns ON ns.subscriber_id = s.id
WHERE ns.opened_at IS NOT NULL
   OR ns.open_count > 0;
